positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical mandala design depicting celestial themes. The central image features overlapping geometric constellations, wispy nebula clouds in deep sapphire, emerald, and gold tones, and stylized crescent moons surrounded by glowing stardust paths. The aesthetic should be clean, intricate, and graphic, utilizing thick, uniform lines and strong color blocking for maximal print contrast. Composition must be centered, repeatable, and scalable for apparel. Global illumination, high contrast, vector illustration style, symmetry, cosmic art, deep space, sacred geometry, perfect repeat pattern.
